rationale: Gov't Code §1372.022 governs allocation of the state ceiling for private activity bonds. It has no operative connection to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: 32.25 percent of the state ceiling is available exclusively for reservations by issuers of qualified mortgage bonds
_note: No conflict identified. The rule addresses bond ceiling allocations, not property tax homestead exemptions.
